series_metadata.series_description: Lists, tables, or other compilations documenting the warrant number, dollar amount, issue date, voucher ID, payee, unclaimed funds claim number, vendor ID and other information for issued warrants.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Paper journals prior to or after June 30, 2010: Retain until no longer of administrative value, provided audited by Auditor of State and audit report issued. ; Electronic: Electronic or Machine Readable Journals before or after July 1, 2010: Retain until no longer of administrative value, provided audited by Auditor of State and audit report issued., Paper: Wastepaper ; Electronic: Erase
